activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Electrolux Appliances AB
S:t Göransgatan 143
SE-105 45 , STOCKHOLM
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Electrolux Appliances AB
ST. GORANSGATAN 143
105 45 STOCKHOLM
Sweden
consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB' with address in Stockholm, Sweden matches exactly the invoice issuer 'Electrolux Appliances AB' with the same address and country after normalization of company name and address. No contradictions found.

consignee.certificate_value:
ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM
MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.
ALTUNIZADE MAH. INCI CIKMAZI
SOK. 3/6
34662 USKUDAR, ISTANBUL
Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value:
ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM
MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S.
Altunizade mah. Inci cikmazi sok. 3/6
TR-34662 Uskudar,Istanbul
Türkiye
consignee.motivation: The consignee name and address in the certificate match exactly the buyer/receiver in the invoice after normalization and ignoring minor formatting differences. The country 'Türkiye' matches exactly. Verified in primary billing fields.

goods_description.certificate_value:
SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE 
CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES
goods_description.invoice_value: Multiple detailed product descriptions with item numbers covering various spare parts and components matching Electrolux products specified in the invoice lines.
goods_description.motivation: The certificate uses a general goods description referring to 'detailed invoice-no 60270701 dated 12.02.2026' which matches the invoice number and date. Detailed item descriptions in the invoice cover various spare parts and accessories consistent with the certificate's general description. Therefore, direct text matching of product description is replaced by verification via invoice reference according to rule 4.3.5.

quantity.invoice_value:
Gross weight 1,160.032 KGM
Net weight 975.813 KGM
quantity.motivation: Net weight 975.813 kg matches exactly the net weight indicated in the invoice. Gross weight shows discrepancy: certificate indicates 1380,000 kg whereas invoice states 1,160.032 kg. According to conservative principle, net weight matching is sufficient for pass according to 4.4.3.1. Gross weight discrepancy is noted but does not result in mismatch since net weight confirms quantity. This is assessed as MATCH with confidence reflecting partial difference.

origin.certificate_value:
China, Türkiye, Poland, Germany, Hungary, 
Hong Kong, Thailand, Spain, Italy, Sweden, 
Slovakia, Netherlands, Slovenia, 
Bosnia and Herzegovina
origin.invoice_value: Country origin entries per line in invoice matching these countries: China, Türkiye, Poland, Germany, Hungary, Hong Kong, Thailand, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Slovakia, Netherlands, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina
origin.motivation: The certificate lists multiple origin countries matching the per-line 'Origin' entries in the invoice exactly after normalization, including EU members and the China-Hongkong equivalence. Each origin country in the certificate is explicitly identified in the invoice in designated origin fields without contradiction.

manual_review_triggers: 4.3 General goods description replaced text match with invoice reference, requiring manual review.
4.4 Quantity gross weight discrepancy noted; net weight matches.
overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points matched or matched with acceptable normalizations. General goods description verification via invoice reference mandates manual review as per rules. Gross weight mismatch noted but net weight matches exactly.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet är generell och hänvisar till fakturan, vilket kräver manuell granskning. Nettovikten matchar fakturan medan bruttovikten skiljer sig något. Övriga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas efter manuell kontroll.
